title: Tech stocks suffer worst week in nearly a year, driven down by war worries, Meta legal woes
summary_full: Meta's twin legal defeats this week and a big sell-off in Micron spurred a drop in technology stocks, which were broadly hit by rising oil prices.
summary_public: Meta's twin legal defeats this week and a big sell-off in Micron spurred a drop in technology stocks, which were broadly hit by rising oil prices.
